description_long: This is a vintage Shell-branded fuel pump, painted in a bright red color with yellow Shell logos prominently displayed on the circular top and the front panel. The pump features a large round gauge in the center, likely for measuring fuel dispensed, and a rectangular display above it with the Shell name. A black fuel hose with a metallic nozzle is attached to the right side, looping down and hanging from a side-mounted holder. The base is sturdy and flared, providing stability, and the overall structure is tall and narrow, typical of early to mid-20th-century gas pumps. The surface shows a glossy finish with some visible wear, giving it an authentic, slightly weathered appearance.
description: A tall, vintage red Shell fuel pump with yellow branding, a round gauge, and a black hose with nozzle attached to the side. The pump has a glossy, slightly worn finish and classic retro styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Shell logo, round gauge, rectangular Shell sign, and the main fuel hose with nozzle.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the protruding hose holder, the looped black hose, and the pump's narrow profile.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the Shell logo on the top, the side panel, and the hose holder with attached hose.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a small triangular sign, the plain back panel, and the side profile of the circular Shell logo.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage fuel pump, painted red with yellow Shell branding, featuring a single black hose and metallic nozzle attached to the right side. The pump has a round gauge and a rectangular Shell sign above it, with no digital displays.
attribute_station_signage: Shell logos are visible on the circular top and front panel, both in yellow with a red shell design. There is also a rectangular Shell sign above the gauge and a small triangular sign on the rear. Additional small text is present on the lower front panel.
